description_long: This object is a cubic, wooden filing cabinet with a dark brown, horizontally-grained wood texture on all visible sides. The cabinet is framed by a lighter, weathered wooden border that outlines each face, giving it a sturdy and reinforced appearance. There are no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, and the surfaces are uninterrupted, suggesting a minimalist or possibly decorative design. The top and sides are flat, making the object suitable for stacking or placing items on top. The overall construction appears solid and robust, with no visible openings or interactive components. Its utilitarian look would fit well in a garage, warehouse, or industrial urban setting.
description: A cubic, dark brown wooden filing cabinet with a lighter wood frame and no visible handles or drawers. The surfaces are flat and uninterrupted, giving it a sturdy, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: The front face shows a flat, dark wood panel framed by a lighter wood border, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same dark wood panel and light wood frame.
description_view_2: The rear view matches the other sides, with a continuous dark wood panel and light border, no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: This view is similar to the others, showing the same materials and construction, with no visible hardware or openings.
